title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 27
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost coat.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your coat yet? You seemed worried earlier today. || Man: Not at first. I went back to the classroom after the lesson, and then I checked the school café, but nobody had handed it in. || Woman: So where did it turn up? || Man: A member of staff rang me. [1]It is at the sports hall reception[/1]. I will collect it before the place closes, because I need it tomorrow. || Woman: That is a relief. At least you can stop searching and get ready now.
items.question: Where is the coat?
items.explanation: The coat is at the sports hall reception.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for a day at the beach.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you packed for our day at the beach tomorrow yet? I put a volleyball in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Woman: That was mentioned earlier, but the forecast says it will be sunny all afternoon. [1]We really need to take sun cream[/1].. || Man: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a raincoat as well? || Woman: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should they take?
items.explanation: They need to take sun cream.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about Friday evening.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to go to a concert this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Boy: That was our first plan, but the concert tickets have sold out and we want to go out. We also thought about whether to play computer games. || Girl: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Boy: [1]We are going to the quiz night instead[/1].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Girl: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to go to a quiz night.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a swimming lesson.
items.audio_script: Boy: I need to check the time for the swimming lesson. I wrote down half past four, but I am not sure it is correct. || Girl: It changed this morning because the earlier group is having extra practice. [1]The lesson starts at five o'clock today[/1]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Boy: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Girl: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the lesson start?
items.explanation: The lesson starts at five o'clock.

items.context: You hear two family members talking about a washing machine.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting on with the washing machine? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Man: I first thought the door would not open, and my brother wondered whether it was making a loud noise. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [1]It is leaking water onto the kitchen floor[/1].. || Woman: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it because we need clean clothes for the trip. || Man: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the washing machine?

options.C: It is making a loud noise

items.explanation: The washing machine is leaking water.

items.context: You hear two friends planning a visit to the aquarium.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the aquarium on Saturday? I thought you were planning to travel by underground. || Woman: I was, but the underground line is closed and Mum has offered to drive us. I also considered going by bus. [1]We will go by car instead[/1].. || Man: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Woman: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Man: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will they get to the aquarium?

items.context: You hear two people buying a present for a baby.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you choose anything for the new baby's present? You were thinking about a soft toy when we spoke yesterday. || Boy: I looked at that, and nearly chose a blanket, but the parents already have plenty of blankets and toys. [1]I bought a set of clothes in the end[/1].. || Girl: That sounds like a better choice. It is useful as well as thoughtful, so I am sure they will like it. || Boy: I hope so. I kept the receipt just in case, and I will wrap it carefully this evening after dinner.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker bought a set of clothes.
